issue.message: The drawable "splash" in drawable-land-hdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "splash" in drawable-land-mdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "splash" in drawable-land-xhdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "splash" in drawable-land-xxhdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "splash" in drawable-land-xxxhdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "splash" in drawable-port-hdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "splash" in drawable-port-mdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "splash" in drawable-port-xhdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "splash" in drawable-port-xxhdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier

The drawable "splash" in drawable-port-xxxhdpi has no declaration in the base `drawable` folder or in a `drawable-`*density*`dpi` folder; this can lead to crashes when the drawable is queried in a configuration that does not match this qualifier
`<uses-permission>` tag appears after `<application>` tag
This folder configuration (`v24`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 24. Merge all the resources in this folder into `drawable`.
The resource `R.layout.activity_main` appears to be unused
The resource `R.xml.config` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.ic_launcher_background` appears to be unused
The resource `R.color.ic_launcher_background` appears to be unused
The resource `R.drawable.ic_launcher_foreground` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.package_name` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.custom_url_scheme` appears to be unused
The resource `R.style.AppTheme_NoActionBar` appears to be unused

The image `splash.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: drawable-land-hdpi/splash.png: 533x320 dp (800x480 px), drawable-land-mdpi/splash.png: 480x320 dp (480x320 px), drawable-land-xhdpi/splash.png: 640x360 dp (1280x720 px), drawable-land-xxhdpi/splash.png: 533x320 dp (1600x960 px), drawable-land-xxxhdpi/splash.png: 480x320 dp (1920x1280 px)
